title: 6 x Infusion-Max 1L N2O Cylinders | Nang Delivery Brisbane
description: 6 Infusion-Max N2O cylinders (615g each) with free nozzle. Triple-cleaned & certified. Fast delivery from Nang Delivery Brisbane.
og_title: 6 x Infusion-Max 1L N2O Cylinders | Nang Delivery Brisbane
og_description: Free Pressure release nozzle 	Each TANK is 615g which is equal to around 100~110 traditional chargers.	Disposable (Note: dispose of empty cartridge only!).	Cost effective – With it, no dispenser anymore, no annoying chargers the coming day.	Filled with 615g of certified pure culinary-grade gas.	Made of 100% recyclable steel.	No sleek buildup or mechanical delayed flavor impression.	Easy Installation	Guaranteed no-duds or leakage.	Guaranteed no oily residue or industrial aftertaste.Triple cleaning process removes residue and impurities.	Manufacturers compliance standards & certifications: ISO 9001, ISO 9002, ISO ISO 14001, with TUV, NSF, and HACCP.
